title: AWS Integration + Storage Backends — LocalStack-to-Live Migration Path
description: aws_integration.py provides S3EvidenceStore, SecurityHubPusher, IAMAuditor, and CloudWatchMetrics targeting LocalStack by default. storage_backends.py implements WORM-compliant storage with governance/compliance retention modes. Gap: switching from LocalStack to live AWS requires manual endpoint_url=None change — there is no environment-driven migration path, and the IAMAuditor does not auto-remediate overprivileged policies.
missing: Environment-driven AWS mode: read AWS_ENDPOINT_URL env var; if empty/None, use real AWS endpoints with full SigV4 signing and no LocalStack fallback
IAM overprivilege auto-remediation: when IAMAuditor finds overprivileged policies, generate least-privilege replacement policy JSON and optionally apply via boto3
S3 Object Lock enforcement: when creating WORM evidence buckets, enforce S3 Object Lock COMPLIANCE mode with retention_days from policy
